hooks.command: sh -c 'root=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || pwd); py="$root/.venv/bin/python"; if [ ! -x "$py" ]; then py=python3; fi; exec "$py" "$root/.codex/hooks/session_start_dispatcher.py"'
hooks.commandWindows: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$root = (git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>$null); if (-not $root) { $root = (Get-Location).Path }; $py = Join-Path $root '.venv\Scripts\python.exe'; if (Test-Path $py) { & $py (Join-Path $root '.codex\hooks\session_start_dispatcher.py') } else { & py -3 (Join-Path $root '.codex\hooks\session_start_dispatcher.py') }"
hooks.statusMessage: Loading current truth and doc-staleness preflight

hooks.command: sh -c 'root=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || pwd); py="$root/.venv/bin/python"; if [ ! -x "$py" ]; then py=python3; fi; exec "$py" "$root/.codex/hooks/stop_doc_staleness_guard.py"'
hooks.commandWindows: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$root = (git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>$null); if (-not $root) { $root = (Get-Location).Path }; $py = Join-Path $root '.venv\Scripts\python.exe'; if (Test-Path $py) { & $py (Join-Path $root '.codex\hooks\stop_doc_staleness_guard.py') } else { & py -3 (Join-Path $root '.codex\hooks\stop_doc_staleness_guard.py') }"
